issue.message: Composable lambda parameter should be named `content`
Composable lambda parameter should be the last parameter so it can be used as a trailing lambda
Composable lambda parameter should be the last parameter so it can be used as a trailing lambda
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter

issue.errorLine1: /** The pointers currently down, in order of which they were done and mapping to their type. */

issue.message: ContentElement does not override inspectableProperties(). The layout inspector will use the default implementation of this function, which will attempt to read ContentElement's properties reflectively. Override inspectableProperties() if you'd like to customize this modifier's presentation in the layout inspector.

ContainerElement does not override inspectableProperties(). The layout inspector will use the default implementation of this function, which will attempt to read ContainerElement's properties reflectively. Override inspectableProperties() if you'd like to customize this modifier's presentation in the layout inspector.

The layout inspector will use the default implementation of this function, which will attempt to read DrawInContainerElement's properties reflectively.
